title: podmanv2 pod ps
body:
add the ability to list pods in podmanv2

Signed-off-by: Brent Baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body:
> Tested local and remote. Smoke tests are working fine but the output differs from v1 and --format doesn't work.
> 
>     * `--format` doesn't seem to work.
> 
> 
> ```
> libpod (v2podps) $ sudo ./bin/podmanV2 pod ps --format "{{ .ID }}"
> Error: template: listPods:1:15: executing "listPods" at <.ID>: can't evaluate field ID in type *entities.ListPodsReport
> ```
> 
>     * The output of `--ctr-ids` has changed (CONTAINER INFO -> IDS) and from single item slice to a comma-separated string. Similar issue for `--ctr-{names,status}`.
> 
> 
> ```
> libpod (v2podps) $ sudo podman pod ps --ctr-ids
> POD ID         NAME   STATUS    CREATED         CONTAINER INFO                                  INFRA ID
> 276c991d67e4   bar    Created   4 minutes ago   [3f2d23b8ea47] [77b09cf530d7]                   77b09cf530d7
> 414c1d262dc4   foo    Created   4 minutes ago   [2114797d8640] [4fc699833841] [c5db7907f6ef]    4fc699833841
> libpod (v2podps) $ sudo ./bin/podmanV2 pod ps --ctr-ids
> POD ID        NAME    STATUS   CREATED        IDS                                     INFRA ID
> 276c991d67e4  bar     Created  4 minutes ago  3f2d23b8ea47,77b09cf530d7               77b09cf530d7
> 414c1d262dc4  foo     Created  4 minutes ago  2114797d8640,4fc699833841,c5db7907f6ef  4fc699833841
> ```

use {{ .Id}}
and yes, format is changing a bit for clarity
